name: Huafa Property Services Group Company Limited
summary: Huafa Property Services Group Company Limited, an investment holding company, provides property management services in Mainland China. It also offers property management related value-added services, including municipal supporting and other services; hotel advisory; and exhibition planning and organization services. The company was formerly known as HJ Capital (International) Holdings Company Limited and changed its name to Huafa Property Services Group Company Limited in March 2021. Huafa Property Services Group Company Limited was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
